headline: CME's Bitcoin Volatility Index Futures Now Available For Trading
summary: CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, announced its new Bitcoin Volatility Index futures are now available for trading. First trades were executed as blocks between DV Chain and Monarq Asset Management.
